CustomObject.description: Reference author-owned domain event for issue #64. A shipping workflow step emits this mid-flight via ctx.emit()/StepResult.complete(...,events); a subscriber (OrderShippedTrigger) starts the downstream refund workflow. Uses PublishAfterCommit so the engine's commit-coupled publish fires only when the emitting step's COMPLETE transition commits — never on a retry/yield/rollback. Delivery to subscribers is still at-least-once; subscribers must stay idempotent.
CustomObject.label: Order Shipped
